prestazioni: Engine swap to Jaguar AJ-V8 4.2L supercharged (engine code: AJ34S) with a custom Harrop HTV2300 supercharger upgrade (12psi boost, 600+ hp), paired with a Quaife ATB differential for the ZF 6HP28 transmission to handle increased torque

Full custom exhaust system by Milltek Sport featuring 3.5" mandrel-bent stainless steel piping, dual-mode valves, and quad 100mm titanium tips, optimized for the AJ34S V8 with a custom ECU tune by Viezu Technologies (Stage 3+ map with E85 flex-fuel capability)

Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers with custom valving for the L322 chassis, paired with Eibach Pro-Spacer 30mm wheel spacers and polybush kit from SuperPro (part #SPF5089K) to eliminate suspension slop and improve turn-in response
estetica: Full widebody conversion using the Overfinch 570S kit (L322-specific, not generic) with carbon fiber fender flares, paired with a custom front splitter and rear diffuser by Prior Design (PD-LR322) for aggressive aero

22" Rotiform LAS-R wheels in a staggered fitment (9.5" front, 11.5" rear) with custom offsets to clear the upgraded Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (380mm discs) and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (285/35 front, 325/30 rear)

Full interior retrim by Royal Steering Wheels featuring a custom Alcantara-wrapped dashboard, Recaro CS Sportster seats (L322-specific mounting brackets), and a digital gauge cluster by AIM MXS Strada with CAN bus integration for the AJ34S engine data
